ddls:
CREATE TABLE "law_schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each law school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the law school */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the law school */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the admissions office */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the law school was founded */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students currently enrolled */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the law school */,
  "ranking" TEXT /* National or regional ranking of the law school */,
  "accreditation_status" TEXT /* Current accreditation status of the law school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the law school associated with the application */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the applicant submitting the application */,
  "date_submitted" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the application (e.g., submitted, under review, accepted, rejected) */,
  "application_type" TEXT /* Type of application (e.g., early decision, regular decision) */,
  "program" TEXT /* Specific program the applicant is applying to (e.g., JD, LLM) */,
  "submission_method" TEXT /* Method by which the application was submitted (e.g., online, mail) */,
  "fee_paid" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the application fee has been paid */,
  "decision_date" TEXT /* Date the final decision was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES law_schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applicants" (
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each applicant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the applicant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the applicant */,
  "undergraduate_gpa" REAL /* Undergraduate GPA of the applicant */,
  "lsat_score" INTEGER /* LSAT score of the applicant */,
  "geographic_region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the applicant */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the applicant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the applicant */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the applicant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the applicant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Mailing address of the applicant */,
  "citizenship_status" TEXT /* Citizenship status of the applicant */,
  "previous_degrees" TEXT /* JSON array of previous degrees */,
  "work_experience" TEXT /* JSON array of work experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admissions" (
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admission record */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the law school associated with the record */,
  "total_applied" INTEGER /* Total number of applications received */,
  "total_accepted" INTEGER /* Total number of applications accepted */,
  "acceptance_rate" REAL /* Acceptance rate as a percentage */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the admission statistics are for */,
  "total_interviewed" INTEGER /* Total number of applicants who were interviewed */,
  "total_withdrawn" INTEGER /* Total number of applicants who withdrew their application */,
  "average_gpa" REAL /* Average undergraduate GPA of accepted applicants */,
  "average_lsat_score" INTEGER /* Average LSAT score of accepted applicants */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admissions_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES law_schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the application associated with the log */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was taken */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action taken (e.g., reviewed, accepted, rejected) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes regarding the action */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who took the action */,
  "log_source" TEXT /* Source of the log entry (e.g., web, mobile app) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_logs_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, admissions officer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON array of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outreach_initiatives" (
  "initiative_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outreach initiative */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the law school conducting the initiative */,
  "initiative_name" TEXT /* Name of the initiative */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the initiative */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the initiative was conducted */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the initiative */,
  "number_of_participants" INTEGER /* Number of participants in the initiative */,
  "estimated_cost" REAL /* Estimated cost of the initiative */,
  "impact" TEXT /* JSON array of impact metrics */,
  "follow_up" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if follow-up activities are planned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("initiative_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outreach_initiatives_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES law_schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scholarships" (
  "scholarship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scholarship */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the law school offering the scholarship */,
  "scholarship_name" TEXT /* Name of the scholarship */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount awarded by the scholarship */,
  "requirements" TEXT /* Requirements to qualify for the scholarship */,
  "application_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for applying for the scholarship */,
  "number_of_awards" INTEGER /* Number of awards available */,
  "renewable" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the scholarship is renewable */,
  "application_requirements" TEXT /* JSON array of additional application requirements */,
  "selection_process" TEXT /* Description of the selection process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scholarship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scholarships_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES law_schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applicant_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the applicant providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the applicant */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the admissions experience (1-5 scale) */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the application associated with the feedback */,
  "improvement_suggestions" TEXT /* Suggestions for improving the admissions process */,
  "follow_up_required" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if follow-up is required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applicant_feedback_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applicant_feedback_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the law school hosting the event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date when the event is held */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event */,
  "registration_link" TEXT /* Link for registering for the event */,
  "estimated_attendance" INTEGER /* Estimated number of attendees */,
  "actual_attendance" INTEGER /* Actual number of attendees */,
  "follow_up_actions" TEXT /* JSON array of follow-up actions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES law_schools ("school_id")
)
